title: BEM-592 intake postfix check
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_path=Path('governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json')
result_path=Path('governance/reports/operator_reply_intake_result.md')
decisions_dir=Path('governance/operator_decisions')
handoff_dir=Path('governance/tasks/pending')
workflow=Path('.github/workflows/operator-reply-intake.yml')
script=Path('scripts/operator_reply_intake.py')
state={}
if state_path.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(state_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={'parse_error':True,'raw':state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}
last=state.get('last_run') if isinstance(state,dict) else None
decision_files=[str(p) for p in sorted(decisions_dir.glob('*.json'), key=lambda x: str(x))] if decisions_dir.exists() else []
handoff_files=[str(p) for p in sorted(handoff_dir.glob('operator_decision_*.md'), key=lambda x: str(x))] if handoff_dir.exists() else []
status='unknown'
blocker=None
if isinstance(last,dict):
    status=last.get('status') or 'unknown'
    blocker=last.get('blocker')
else:
    status='no_intake_state_yet'
    blocker={'code':'OPERATOR_REPLY_INTAKE_STATE_MISSING','message':'No operator reply intake state after safe YAML commit; push workflow may not have completed or still failed before commit.'}
if decision_files:
    status='decision_file_present'
    blocker=None
report_lines=['# BEM-592 | Operator Reply Intake Postfix Check','', 'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:43 (UTC+3)', '', '## Files', '- workflow exists: '+str(workflow.exists()), '- script exists: '+str(script.exists()), '- state exists: '+str(state_path.exists()), '- result report exists: '+str(result_path.exists()), '', '## Decisions', json.dumps(decision_files,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), '', '## Handoffs', json.dumps(handoff_files,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), '', '## Last run', json.dumps(last,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2) if isinstance(last,dict) else str(last), '', '## Status', status, '', '## Blocker', 'null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)]
report=reports/'bem592_operator_reply_intake_postfix_check.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(report_lines)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem592_operator_reply_intake_postfix_check','cycle_id':'bem592-operator-reply-intake-postfix-check','source':'gpt','status':status,'decision_files':decision_files,'handoff_files':handoff_files,'last_run':last,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:43 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem592_operator_reply_intake_postfix_check']={'status':status,'decision_files':decision_files,'handoff_files':handoff_files,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:43 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem592_operator_reply_intake_postfix_check.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-592 status='+status+' decision_files='+json.dumps(decision_files,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Checked operator reply intake status after safe YAML fix')
"""
No issue comments.
